tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Brazil is one of the most successful football nations in history and is famous for its attacking style of play.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Brazil has won the FIFA World Cup five times, the most by any national team.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Legendary players include Pelé, Ronaldo Nazário, Ronaldinho and Neymar.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Argentina is one of the most powerful football nations and has produced some of the greatest players in history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Argentina has won the FIFA World Cup multiple times including the 2022 World Cup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Famous players include Diego Maradona and Lionel Messi.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: France is one of the strongest modern football teams with many world class players.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: France won the FIFA World Cup in 1998 and 2018.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: France has produced legendary players like Zinedine Zidane and Thierry Henry.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Germany is historically one of the most successful teams in international football.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Germany has won multiple FIFA World Cups and European Championships.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Germany is known for disciplined and tactical football.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Spain is known for its famous possession based football style called 'Tiki-Taka'.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Spain won the FIFA World Cup in 2010 and multiple UEFA European Championships.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Spain dominated world football between 2008 and 2012.
